tourSegments.text: Welcome to the TROPTIONS investor showcase. TROPTIONS is FTH Trading's operating brand for education, broadcast, exchange, and token launch—backed by Troptions-full-pack, an open sovereign stack you can clone and diligence.

The story spans twenty-two years from Macon origins through a regulatory chapter to today's live unykorn.org properties and engineering maturity nine point zero on main. This site uses honest labels: we separate verified live URLs from future DNS and local development.

Revenue pillars include FTH Academy subscriptions on fthedu dot unykorn dot org, TTN and sports sponsorship pipeline on troptionslive, Exchange OS and launcher fees when mainnet gates clear, Polygon KENNY and EVL community tokens, T-Lev-8 RWA partnerships, and optional branches such as DAO fees on a feature branch or NEED AI phone service. Marketing figures like one hundred seventy five million dollars are operator attestation until verified on chain.

Verified live today: troptions dot unykorn dot org for the institutional hub, troptionslive sports, launch dot unykorn dot org for the Solana launcher, and fthedu for the academy. Planned hostnames ai dot troptions dot org and ttn dot troptions dot org are nginx templates only until Bryan and ops point DNS—not broken promises. For live AI answers, run the stack locally or wait for DNS cutover.

Proof means truth labels, domain truth table, and on-chain reference docs. Before you cite live status in a deck, re-run truth label scripts and read the proof section. Thank you for reviewing TROPTIONS with premium confidence and zero hype.

faq.question: What is TROPTIONS?
faq.answer: TROPTIONS is the operating brand and engineering home for education, broadcast, exchange, and governance—plus Troptions-full-pack, the monorepo investors and architects can review. Live public surfaces today are on unykorn.org.

faq.question: What is ai.troptions.org?
faq.answer: Planned public hostname for DONK AI tutor (nginx → donk-tutor). DNS does not resolve today—Bryan does not currently run it. Live AI: run deploy quickstart locally, or use unykorn paths until DNS cutover. See DOMAIN_TRUTH_TABLE.

faq.question: What is ttn.troptions.org?
faq.answer: Future DNS for TTN launcher edge. Not deployed. Live sports/broadcast surface: https://troptionslive.unykorn.org/sports

faq.question: What is dao.troptions.org?
faq.answer: Future DNS for DAO dashboard/API edge. Not deployed. Governance stack runs in-repo; public DNS pending ops.

faq.question: Which domains are actually live?
faq.answer: Verified HTTP 200 (May 2026): troptions.unykorn.org, troptionslive.unykorn.org/sports, launch.unykorn.org, fthedu.unykorn.org. Full table: DOMAIN_TRUTH_TABLE on this site.

faq.question: How does TROPTIONS make money?
faq.answer: Academy subscriptions, TTN sponsorship pipeline, Exchange/launch fees (mainnet-gated), Solana launcher, Polygon KENNY/EVL, T-Lev-8 RWA licensing, optional DAO/x402 and NEED AI. See executive/revenue.

faq.question: What about the $175M claim?
faq.answer: Operator attestation and brand narrative until XRPL/on-chain verification. See proof/truth-labels and on-chain-proofs.

faq.question: What is the history?
faq.answer: Macon 2003 origins, growth, regulatory chapter, today's sovereign stack—not legal advice. See executive/history.

faq.question: Where is the investor deck?
faq.answer: executive/deck — slide outline for PowerPoint or Print to PDF. executive/overview for one-page summary.

faq.question: What does maturity 9.0 mean?
faq.answer: Engineering checklist on main: TLS templates, API auth, DAO↔L1 wiring, truth scripts—not a claim that every hostname resolves. See executive/infrastructure.

faq.question: Is the L1 Byzantine fault tolerant?
faq.answer: No on main. Sovereign Sequencer single-node. Multi-validator and fraud proofs are roadmap.

faq.question: Where is FTH Academy?
faq.answer: https://fthedu.unykorn.org/ — verified live. Stripe tier patterns in revenue docs.

faq.question: Where is sports / TTN?
faq.answer: https://troptionslive.unykorn.org/sports — verified live. Sponsorship tiers are pipeline until contracts close.

faq.question: What is T-Lev-8?
faq.answer: Partner deal room: https://fthtrading.github.io/T-Lev-8-/ plus rwa-realestate contracts.

faq.question: How do I get live AI answers?
faq.answer: Run deploy quickstart, start donk-tutor locally, connect Ask panel—or wait for ai.troptions.org DNS. Offline FAQ works without API.

faq.question: Where are technical docs?
faq.answer: Expand For engineers on the home page: L1, quickstart, backends, architecture. Ports listed there—not in the investor hero.
